docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KARTSEV, VIKTOR N DBA VIK ELECTRIC AS TO DEFENDANT DIVERSE TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-11-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DIVERSE TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KARTSEV, VIKTOR N DBA VIK ELECTRIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIVERSE TECHNOLOGY SOLUTIONS INC $688.03 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $748.03, PER 11/03/2009 EMAIL FROM M. ROBINSON TO O. KARTSEV, DEFENDANT ADMITTED TO OWING PLAINTIFF FOR LENSCRAFTER ($240.00) AND FOR ILORI($388.03). PLUS $60.00 OWED FOR SUNGLASS HUT TOTAL $688.03. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
